_comment: Master state file. Holdings/cash = live from Kite MCP. Non-Kite assets = Google Drive sheet [google_sheet_id from user_config.json]. This file tracks: budget, trailing stops, FD calendar, execution log.

positions._note: Gain is income distribution, not capital appreciation

trailing_stops._note: Set at -8% from peak for positions with >15% gain. Ratchet up every 5% gain. Updated by SKILL-06 weekly.

weekly_snapshots._note: Appended every Sunday by SKILL-06. Rolling 52 weeks. Used for XIRR approximation and P&L trend.
weekly_snapshots._xirr_note: XIRR = annualised return from cashflow series. Each snapshot is a data point: (date, portfolio_value). Deployments from paper_trades.json are the cashflows.
